channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mama Ngina and Criticos seek court enforcement of land title in Taita Taveta
item.description: Former First Lady Mama Ngina Kenyatta together with ex-Taveta MP Basil Criticos have returned to the Environment and Land Court in Nairobi, demanding that the Chief Land Registrar implements a Decembe...

item.title: Attempt on Former Kashmir CM Farooq Abdullah Foiled by Security
item.description: On 12th March 2026, senior Kashmiri politician Farooq Abdullah narrowly escaped an assassination attempt at a wedding ceremony in Greater Kailash, Jammu, according to Indian media reports. Abdullah, f...

item.title: Hornwort Protein Could Improve Photosynthesis Efficiency in Crops
item.description: Researchers have discovered a unique molecular feature in hornwort plants that could help increase crop efficiency. The small protein component, named RbcS-STAR, modifies the key photosynthesis enzyme...

item.title: Islamabad High Court Reserves Judgement on Petition to Shift Imran Khan to Shifa Hospital for Eye Treatment
item.description: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) has reserved its verdict in a case where PTI founder and former Prime Minister Imran Khan's transfer to Shifa International Hospital for specialised eye treatment is bei...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif Visits Saudi Arabia Amid Escalating Middle East Conflict to Discuss Regional Tensions and Bilateral Ties
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has left for a short official visit to Saudi Arabia at the invitation of Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman. This trip happens while the Middle East faces serious escalatio...

item.title: Two backpackers perish in Queensland floods as communities brace for further damage
item.description: Two young backpackers, a 26-year-old man and a 23-year-old woman, tragically drowned when their car was swept off a bridge during severe flooding in Queensland. The pair, believed to be Chinese nation...

item.title: Supreme Court grants bail to Shabir Shah citing long custody and prosecution delays
item.description: On Thursday, the Supreme Court of India granted bail to Kashmiri separatist leader Shabir Shah in connection with a 2017 terror funding case. The bench, consisting of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep ...

item.title: Chatsworth teenager seriously injured after running into traffic to escape dogs
item.description: A 17-year-old pupil from Chatsworth was seriously injured on Wednesday morning while walking to Newhaven Secondary School after being chased by two dogs along Silverglen Drive. The dogs, reportedly pe...

item.title: National Assembly Approves Ruto’s NLC Nominees Amid Competence Concerns
item.description: The National Assembly has approved seven nominees put forward by President William Ruto for the National Land Commission (NLC), though questions remain over the competence of some individuals. The nom...

item.title: DepEd allocates P19.5 billion for textbook production to achieve 1:1 ratio and improve student literacy in 2026
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) has earmarked P19.5 billion for textbook production in 2026 to improve literacy among Filipino learners and work towards a 1:1 textbook-to-learner ratio in public s...

item.title: Supreme Court clarifies OBC creamy layer determination should consider multiple factors, not just income
item.description: The Supreme Court of India on Thursday clarified that determining whether a candidate belongs to the creamy layer or non-creamy layer of Other Backward Classes (OBCs) cannot rely solely on income. The...

item.title: Tanzania and WHO Introduce Infection Monitoring System in Health Facilities
item.description: Tanzania, working together with the World Health Organization (WHO), has started a new monitoring system to manage infections that patients may get while receiving care in hospitals and health centres...

item.title: Beyoncé, Dr Dre and James Cameron Join Forbes 2026 Celebrity Billionaires List
item.description: According to the latest Forbes report released in March 2026, music superstars Beyoncé and Dr Dre have officially become billionaires, joining an exclusive club of celebrity billionaires. Beyoncé, age...

item.title: Russia Claims to Intercept Two British Long-Range Cruise Missiles Supplied to Ukraine
item.description: On March 12, 2026, Russian Defense Minister Andrei Belusov confirmed that two Storm Shadow long-range cruise missiles supplied by the United Kingdom to Ukraine were intercepted and destroyed between M...

item.title: Palace questions VP Sara's claims on government preparedness for Middle East conflict
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte has faced criticism from Malacañang after she claimed that the Marcos administration did not adequately prepare for the effects of the ongoing Middle East conflict. Palace ...

item.title: Massey Woman Wins $350,000 Lottery Prize
item.description: A mother from Massey, Northern Ontario, has won a $350,000 lottery prize, describing the moment as 'pure happiness'. The announcement comes as a reminder of the life-changing impact lottery winnings c...

item.title: Severe Floods and Political Tensions Impact Multiple African Regions
item.description: Heavy rains in southern Ethiopia have triggered devastating floods and landslides in the Gamo Zone, leaving at least 30 people dead. Most fatalities occurred in highland areas where saturated slopes c...

item.title: PM Shehbaz recommends Nehal Hashmi for Sindh governorship
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has formally forwarded a summary to President Asif Ali Zardari for appointing Nehal Hashmi, a senior leader of Pakistan Muslim League-Nawaz (PML-N), as the new...

item.title: Parliamentary inquiry launched to examine fairness of student loans
item.description: A cross-party committee of MPs has launched an inquiry into the UK's student loan system, responding to widespread dissatisfaction among graduates, particularly following the Chancellor's decision to ...

item.title: BFAR launches Lake Lanao fishing hub to support local fishers and Marawi recovery
item.description: The Bureau of Fisheries and Aquatic Resources (BFAR) has initiated a three-year project to develop an Integrated Cold Hub Complex in Marawi City, with full completion expected by 2029. The project aim...
